---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or module
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem or use case.

**Describe the solution**
What should the feature look like? Include:

- Feature name (kebab-case)
- Backend only / Frontend only / Full-stack
- SSR needed? (Yes/No)
- Wireframe / UI sketch (if applicable)

**Describe alternatives**
Any workarounds you've considered.

**Additional context**
Anything else — links, references, examples.
